preconditions: User is unauthenticated and has not signed in
Application is running in SPA mode and Home page should load in guest state

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Open a browser session
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page guest state to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state while the user remains unauthenticated and the shared Home page shell is visible.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state Home controls are visible and enabled on initial page load
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Observe the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button
Attempt to focus and click each visible control once
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button are visible, enabled, focusable, and actionable in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Person/Profile button opens the Login page or Login view from Home guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Person/Profile button once
Observe the application transition
testCases.expectedResult: Selecting the Person/Profile button transitions the application from Home guest state to the Login page or Login view while preserving unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Customer signup button opens the customer-search page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Customer signup button once
Observe the destination view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the customer-search page without authenticating the user.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Clean survey button opens the vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Clean survey button once
Observe the destination view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the vehicle-survey page while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Site survey button opens the survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Site survey button once
Observe the destination view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the survey page while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening Login view from Person/Profile button
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view
Use browser navigation or available SPA navigation to return to the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the approved guest-state controls remain visible and enabled without authenticating the user.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening customer-search page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Customer signup button
Return to the Home page using approved application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page guest state reloads successfully and the user remains unauthenticated with guest-state controls available.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Clean survey button
Return to the Home page using approved application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page guest state is restored and all approved guest-state controls remain visible and enabled.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Site survey button
Return to the Home page using approved application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page guest state reappears correctly and the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled throughout guest-state navigation
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Open the customer-search page using Customer signup button
Return to the Home page guest state
Observe the Home button availability
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button remains visible and enabled across guest-state navigation flows and continues to behave as a shared Home shell control.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in Home guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Observe the Back button
Click the Back button once
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled in guest state and the application does not expose authenticated-only functionality after interaction.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in Home guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Observe the Notification button
Click the Notification button once
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state and no authenticated-only state becomes available after interaction.

testCases.title: Verify Home page remains in guest state after repeated navigation between guest-accessible pages
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Open the customer-search page and return to Home
Open the vehicle-survey page and return to Home
Open the survey page and return to Home
testCases.expectedResult: Each navigation transition completes successfully and the Home page consistently returns in guest state without exposing authenticated-only controls or a logged-in user name button.
